messages.author: basiccode12
messages.text: Change Bluetooth Device Name Current Config displays "MeshCore - <Custom Name>" where "Meshcore" cannot be removed Change Additional Bluetooth Name Field (if possible) so that BT name does not have to be the same as the user identity. This can easily be used for stalking. If <Custom Name> contains data, then BT Name = <Custom Name>, else BT Name = "Meshcore - <Standard ID/Hex Mash>" (edited)

messages.author: Liam Cottle
messages.text: I'd probably prefer to keep a single name in the firmware/preferences, otherwise it would lead to a bit of a confusing experience. Which one to show on the display etc, and when you want to connect to it, the name doesn't match what's on screen. For your use case, I'd probably suggest just editing the code and hard setting the custom name you want, then flash to your device (edited)
